name: The Walk List
description: Annotated doors. Not the whole county - the doors that vote. | EFFECT: Block Walk +12% odds and x1.5 contacts.

name: Voter File Access
description: Last cycle's names, or a cousin's login. Targeting starts here. | EFFECT: Enables Walk List purchase; walks slightly sharper.

name: Mail Program
description: House file, ink, postage. Contrast Mail actually lands. | EFFECT: Contrast Mail cheaper mentally; Subdivisions convert harder.

name: Website That Works
description: Not a Facebook. A real form. Small dollars start here. | EFFECT: Fish Fry / small-dollar +20%; name ID +1 passive/week.

name: The Flatbed Truck
description: Signs, coolers, a generator. Logistics is ideology with a hitch. | EFFECT: Crisis events +name; FM Roads walks stronger; GOTV edge.

name: Part-Time Scheduler
description: Someone who answers the phone so you can walk. | EFFECT: +1 AP max while held (staff is a force multiplier).

name: Yard Sign Cache
description: Unplanted plastic and a staple gun. | EFFECT: Yard Sign Blitz free of $ cost once owned (stock on hand).

name: Phone Tree
description: A printed tree and a grandma who will call until the pizza ends. | EFFECT: Phone Bank +15% odds; double contact yield.

name: Push Cards
description: Corrugated stock. Your face. The issue in fourteen-point type. | EFFECT: Every walk +1 Name ID.

name: Billboard on the Highway
description: Your name above the feedlot exit. Passive ID the expensive way. | EFFECT: +2 Name ID on buy; +1 Name ID each week while held.

name: Casework hours
description: The office never closes for people who still have your number.

name: Fish fry float
description: Whatever the region calls a gathering, you bring a checkbook or a casserole.

name: Quiet money
description: Interim PAC dinners smell the same in every region.

name: Your issue detonates nationally
description: Cable news eats the frame. Hold the knife or pick another.

name: The issue moved without you
description: National air ate the local frame. Your knife is duller.

name: Let the district cool
description: Austin, work, exhaustion - the district notices silence.

name: Sweep your own porch
description: Know what they have. Burn what you can.

name: Do the work your bio promised
description: Veteran visits. Teacher rooms. Pulpit. Counter. Whatever you claimed.

name: Redistricting rumor
description: The lines may move. Rare. Expensive. Not a menu preference.

name: Show up for the regional crisis
description: Flood, freeze, plant layoff, border bus - geography writes the script.

name: Strategic quiet
description: Not every month is a war. Debt and hit pieces still breathe.

name: Town hall in the heat
description: Folding chairs. Your issue, or theirs.

name: Block Walk
description: Boots and a clipboard. The one play that never turns on you. When in doubt.

name: Phone Bank
description: Half the yield, none of the weather. Grandma's kitchen table is HQ.

name: Yard Sign Blitz
description: A district that sees your name starts believing it belongs there. Own Yard Sign Cache (A08) → $0.

name: Petition Drive
description: Signatures instead of a fee. Labor is the currency you were born holding.

name: Pay the Filing Fee
description: $1,250 and it's done. Shame-free, story-free.

name: Town Hall
description: Folding chairs, burnt coffee, real questions. The kids notice if you skip these.

name: Candidate Forum
description: Sixty seconds and every rival watching for the stumble.

name: Kitchen-Table Meeting
description: A chair's kitchen, her rules. Bring pie; leave with a precinct or nothing.

name: Earned Media Pitch
description: A county weekly, a drive-time host, a stringer if you're lucky.

name: Press Release
description: Nobody prints it. Everybody files it. The reporter learns your name spelling.

name: Straw Poll Push
description: Pack the room, count the hands. Clubs remember who wins their straw.

name: Club Speech
description: Rubber chicken, real gatekeepers. Read the room or the room reads you.

name: Fish Fry
description: Five-dollar plates, donation jar, casseroles. Net positive, always.

name: Court the Chairs (Pie Circuit)
description: The kitchen-table circuit at scale. Phase III chairs are already spoken for.

name: Oppo Research
description: A quiet man with a courthouse habit. What he finds becomes yours to spend - or to hold.

name: Recruit Volunteers
description: An army marches on casseroles. Every volunteer makes every other card better.

name: Debate Prep
description: The Kitchen Cabinet plays your rival better than your rival does.

name: Sharpen the Message
description: You are not running on nine things. You are running on one thing, said so it stays said.

name: GOTV Weekend
description: Rapport is a promise. Turnout is the promise kept. One volunteer and a weekend.

name: Take the PAC Check
description: A man in a good suit admires your race. The check is real. So is the string tied to it.

name: Self-Fund on Credit
description: The bank will lend against the homestead. Campaigns have eaten better men's farms.

name: Promote a Canvass Captain
description: One volunteer stops showing up as a volunteer and starts showing up as staff.

name: Contrast Mail
description: What the quiet man found, printed on cheap stock and mailed to every primary voter who votes.

name: Hire a Field Director
description: A professional who has run four of these before. Money buys what volunteers can't always deliver on schedule.

name: District call from Austin
description: The phone does not know you are under the dome.

name: File a bill
description: A number on a jacket. Most die. Filing is still a signal home.

name: Third House dinner
description: Thick stock. No agenda printed. The agenda is the point.

name: Bad hotel sleep
description: Session eats homestead. Dream is a truce, not a strategy.

name: Committee testimony
description: Three points. One story. Leave the rage for the garage.

name: Count votes
description: A spreadsheet of maybes. Never leave it on the printer.
